name: Hot Chicken Heat Test
description: Go to Prince's Hot Chicken and order at least medium heat. Take one full bite and rate your spice tolerance like a food critic. Bonus points if you describe the flavor beyond just "hot."

name: Broadway Honky Tonk Hop
description: Visit three different honky tonk bars on Broadway in one night. Spend at least 10 minutes in each and listen to live music in all three before moving on.

name: Parthenon Perspective
description: Capture a dramatic photo of the full-scale Parthenon in Centennial Park from a creative angle that makes it look like you're in Greece.

name: East Nashville Mural Hunt
description: Find a mural in East Nashville that isn't the famous wings and take a creative pose that matches the vibe of the artwork.

name: Vinyl Treasure Dig
description: Visit Grimey's and dig through the vinyl bins until you find an album you've never heard of. Share why you chose it and what genre you think it is.

name: Hidden Speakeasy Entry
description: Find the hidden speakeasy-style bar The Patterson House and enter through the unassuming door. Soak in the atmosphere before ordering something unique.

name: Pedestrian Bridge Skyline Shot
description: Walk the John Seigenthaler Pedestrian Bridge at sunset and capture a skyline photo with the Cumberland River in frame.

name: Farmers Market Local Bite
description: Visit the Nashville Farmers' Market and try something from a local vendor you've never heard of. Learn one fact about the vendor.

name: Country Music Hall Deep Dive
description: Explore the Country Music Hall of Fame and find an exhibit featuring a legend you didn't grow up listening to. Read their story fully.

name: 12 South Boutique Browse
description: Visit three unique boutiques in 12 South and find one item you'd realistically buy. Describe why it fits your style.

name: Radnor Lake Nature Loop
description: Complete at least one full loop trail at Radnor Lake and keep an eye out for wildlife. Spot at least one animal during your walk.

name: Live Songwriter Round
description: Attend a live songwriter round like at The Listening Room and listen to the stories behind at least two songs.

name: Coffee Flight Challenge
description: Order a coffee flight at a local café or try two different brewing styles. Compare flavor notes like a pro.

name: Gulch Wings Pose
description: Take a photo at the famous 'What Lifts You' wings mural in The Gulch with a creative or unexpected pose.

name: Bicentennial Capitol View
description: Stand at the end of the Bicentennial Mall lawn facing the Capitol and snap a centered symmetry photo.

name: Broadway Line Dance
description: Learn and perform a simple line dance inside a Broadway bar. Capture proof mid-dance.

name: Local BBQ Showdown
description: Try BBQ from a local joint like Martin's or Peg Leg Porker and compare it to another BBQ spot in town.

name: Record Your Own Chorus
description: Visit a public music space or street performer area and record yourself singing one chorus of a country song.

name: Germantown Brunch Quest
description: Try brunch in Germantown and order something outside your comfort zone.

name: Hidden Bookstore Find
description: Visit a local independent bookstore and find a book written by a Tennessee author.

name: Cumberland Kayak Adventure
description: Rent a kayak or paddleboard on the Cumberland River and complete at least 20 minutes on the water.

name: Frist Art Interpretation
description: Visit the Frist Art Museum and choose one artwork to interpret in your own words as if you're the artist.

name: Five Points Bar Crawl
description: Visit two bars in Five Points, each with completely different vibes such as dive versus upscale.

name: Sunrise Overlook Moment
description: Find the scenic overlook Love Circle and watch the sunrise while reflecting for five minutes.

name: Custom Cowboy Hat Try-On
description: Visit a local Western wear shop and try on a cowboy hat that fits your personality.

name: Nashville Food Truck Find
description: Track down a food truck and order their specialty item.

name: Musicians Corner Picnic
description: Attend a live outdoor music event like Musicians Corner and sit through at least two full sets.

name: Art Crawl Night
description: Participate in an art crawl event and visit at least three participating galleries.

name: Latte Art Photo
description: Order a latte with art and capture a close-up photo before taking a sip.

name: Shelby Bottoms Bike Ride
description: Ride a bike along Shelby Bottoms Greenway.

name: Grand Ole Opry Visit
description: Visit the Grand Ole Opry through a tour or show and learn one historical fact about its origins.

name: Hidden Garden Discover
description: Find a lesser-known park or garden space and spend 10 uninterrupted minutes there.

name: Neon Sign Capture
description: Find a classic Nashville neon sign at night and take a moody photo featuring it.

name: Chocolate Factory Stop
description: Visit Olive & Sinclair Chocolate Co. and try a locally made chocolate product.

name: Vintage Shop Treasure
description: Find one vintage clothing piece in East Nashville.

name: Capitol Steps Climb
description: Climb the Tennessee State Capitol steps and walk the surrounding grounds.

name: Rooftop View Cheers
description: Visit a rooftop bar and take in the skyline view before ordering a drink.

name: Mural Matching Outfit
description: Find a colorful mural and wear something that matches part of it for a coordinated photo.

name: Museum Self-Guided Tour
description: Visit the Johnny Cash Museum and complete the full exhibit path.

name: Boba Break
description: Visit a local boba or specialty tea shop and try a flavor you've never had.

name: Bridge Night Walk
description: Walk the John Seigenthaler Pedestrian Bridge at night and capture city lights reflecting in the river.

name: Local Distillery Tour
description: Take a tour of a local distillery and learn how their signature drink is made.

name: Park Yoga Moment
description: Attend or self-lead a 15-minute yoga flow in a public park and capture proof.

name: Hot Chicken!
description: Try hot chicken from any location of Prince's.

name: Street Busker Tip
description: Stop and listen to a street performer for at least one full song and tip them.
